migrations.name: 00_bootstrap_migration_runner
migrations.description: Creates migration_logs table and execute_safe_migration function (SECURITY DEFINER). Must run FIRST via SQL Editor.

migrations.name: 01_storage_bucket_models
migrations.description: Creates public storage bucket for 3D models with read/upload/delete policies
migrations.sql_content:
INSERT INTO storage.buckets (id, name, public)
VALUES ('models', 'models', true);

CREATE POLICY "Public read access for models"
ON storage.objects
FOR SELECT
USING (bucket_id = 'models');

CREATE POLICY "Authenticated users can upload models"
ON storage.objects
FOR INSERT
WITH CHECK (bucket_id = 'models');

CREATE POLICY "Authenticated users can delete models"
ON storage.objects
FOR DELETE
USING (bucket_id = 'models');

migrations.name: 02_allow_anyone_upload
migrations.description: Changes upload policy to allow anyone (no auth required for demo)

migrations.name: 03_tables_categories_models_devmigrations
migrations.description: Creates model_categories, models, dev_migrations tables with RLS and default category

migrations.name: 04_profiles_roles_auth
migrations.description: Creates profiles, user_roles tables, has_role function, handle_new_user trigger, updated_at trigger

migrations.name: 05_model_mesh_mappings
migrations.description: Creates model_mesh_mappings table for per-mesh educational mappings with RLS and updated_at trigger

migrations.name: 06_user_preferences
migrations.description: Creates user_preferences table for theme, view settings per user/device with RLS and updated_at trigger
